name: Bob Freesen YMCA
description: Come play pickleball at Bob Freesen YMCA in Jacksonville, IL! There are 7 hard and wood courts. 4 are outdoors and 3 are indoors. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. Amenities include locker rooms, restrooms, water, and lights.
fees: Members only — Membership or $5 fee to play.

name: Fitness World Health Club
description: Fitness World Health Club is a place to play pickleball in Jacksonville, IL. There are 4 indoor acrylic courts. Tape lines have been laid, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. Players have access to restrooms and locker rooms.
fees: Fee required — Members free non member $5.00
